headline: University student activism restricted by UUCA Section 15
context: Three university students were disciplined under the Universities and University Colleges Act Section 15 in 2024 for participating in off-campus political activities.

cards.big: 3 students disciplined under UUCA for off-campus political participation in 2024
cards.sub: Section 15 restricts student involvement in political parties and activities

cards.big: UUCA 1971 Section 15 prohibits students from joining political organisations
cards.sub: 2019 amendment partially lifted ban but universities retain disciplinary powers

cards.big: Undi 18 lowered voting age to 18 yet student political expression remains restricted
cards.sub: Constitutional right to vote contradicts statutory ban on political participation

cards.big: Student union elections abolished in most universities since 1970s
cards.sub: Democratic participation suppressed at formative stage of civic development

cards.big: Allowing 18-year-olds to vote but not discuss politics on campus is contradictory
Youth Policy Action Council proposed full UUCA Section 15 repeal in 2024
